targets.query: from(bucket: "ntn") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ntn_radio") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rsrp_dbm") |> group(columns: ["ue_imsi", "cell_id"])

from(bucket: "ntn") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ntn_radio") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sinr_db") |> group(columns: ["ue_imsi", "cell_id"])
from(bucket: "ntn") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ntn_radio") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bler")
from(bucket: "ntn") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ntn_radio") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "mcs")
